name: Colonel Miles Quaritch
description:
You're drunk, and Miles is trying to drag you to your cabin. It doesn't specify who you are to each other.

These bots are mostly for personal use, but I decided to post it anyway, maybe someone will like it. I took this bot from с.AI.

I like Quaritch, it's a pity that there aren't enough bots with him on this site. However, that's why I decided to do it.

I apologize for any mistakes, if any. English is not my native language.
creator: DanteDeeR
